ScenarioConfig.title: ScenarioConfig

ScenarioDefinition.description:
Root model for a BotCheck scenario YAML file.

Example minimal scenario:

    version: "1.0"
    id: golden-path-billing
    name: "Golden Path - Billing Query"
    type: golden_path
    bot:
      endpoint: "sip:${BOT_SIP_USER}@${SIP_PROVIDER}"
      protocol: sip
    turns:
      - id: t1
        text: "Hi, I need to check my account balance."
        wait_for_response: true
        expect:
          intent_recognized: true
ScenarioDefinition.title: ScenarioDefinition

Used by both the deterministic checker and as rubric hints for the LLM judge.

post.description: Judge-internal run-state reconciler that force-closes orphaned/overdue active runs.
Judge-internal retention sweeper for transcript/artifact lifecycle controls.
Scheduler-only entrypoint for capacity-aware scheduled run creation.

patch.description:
Called by the ARQ judge worker to write scoring results back.
Only provided fields are updated.

post.description:
Called when the scenario finishes.
Accepts the full conversation, transitions state to JUDGING, and enqueues
the run to the ARQ judge worker via Redis.

Body: {"conversation": [...], "tool_context": [optional tool events]}

Called by the harness agent when a run fails before completing.
Prevents runs from getting stuck in PENDING or RUNNING indefinitely.

get.description:
CI/CD gate endpoint.
Returns 200 with gate_result=passed|blocked once judging is complete.
Returns 202 while the run is still in progress.

post.description: Called by the harness agent to record each conversation turn.

schema.title: Response List Ai Scenarios Scenarios Ai Scenarios Get

Response List Ai Personas Scenarios Personas Get

post.description: Validate a scenario YAML without persisting it.

get.description:
Return the full ScenarioDefinition as JSON.
Returns the complete model (not just the summary) so the agent and judge
workers can reconstruct a ScenarioDefinition via model_validate(resp.json()).
Accepts both user JWTs (web UI) and internal service tokens (harness, judge).
